article_title: Mice Lacking NMDA Receptors in Parvalbumin Neurons Display Normal Depression-Related Behavior and Response to Antidepressant Action of NMDAR Antagonists

evidence_sentences: Doses, times and route of administration were selected based on the observations indicating that both drugs significantly reduced the immobility time in the same behavioral paradigm (FST) at different time points (3).

aggregated_relations.subject: Chronic exposure to mild unpredictable stress
aggregated_relations.object: consumption of highly palatable sucrose solution
evidence_sentences: Chronic exposure to mild unpredictable stress has been found to reduce the consumption of, and preference for, highly palatable sucrose solution in rodents, a behavior that is reversed by antidepressants [45], [46].

aggregated_relations.subject: ketamine
evidence_sentences: acute ketamine administration rapidly increases glutamatergic neurotransmission in the prefrontal cortex of rodents

In accordance with this theory, acute ketamine administration rapidly increases glutamatergic neurotransmission in the prefrontal cortex of rodents, a process most likely mediated by presynaptic NMDA autoreceptors and/or NMDAR expressed on GABAergic interneurons [40], which are known to shape circuit function by changing the balance between excitation and inhibition [41].

aggregated_relations.subject: MK801
evidence_sentences: local infusion of MK801 into the mPFC is sufficient to increase c-fos protein expression (used as a marker of neuronal activation) in various subcortical regions
However, although local infusion of MK801 into the mPFC is sufficient to increase c-fos protein expression (used as a marker of neuronal activation) in various subcortical regions [42]
local infusion of MK801 into the mPFC is sufficient to increase c-fos protein expression in various subcortical regions

aggregated_relations.subject: MK801
evidence_sentences: systemic administration of MK801 is known to increase the firing of pyramidal neurons of the mPFC of awake rats
and systemic administration of MK801 is known to increase the firing of pyramidal neurons of the mPFC of awake rats [42]

aggregated_relations.subject: ketamine
evidence_sentences: the direct infusion of ketamine into the mPFC is not sufficient to produce anti-depressant response in rats
the direct infusion of ketamine into the mPFC is not sufficient to produce anti-depressant response in rats [43]

aggregated_relations.subject: MK801
evidence_sentences: Acute blockage of NMDA receptors by MK801 produces a deficit in sucrose preference in rats

aggregated_relations.subject: NMDAR-dependent activity of PV neurons
evidence_sentences: our results suggest that the NMDAR-dependent activity of PV neurons is not the primary target for the rapid and sustained antidepressant effect of NMDAR antagonists, and that NMDAR-dependent activity of PV neurons does not regulate mood-related behaviors.

aggregated_relations.subject: MK801
evidence_sentences: Acute blockage of NMDA receptors by MK801 produces a deficit in sucrose preference in rats [44]
Acute blockage of NMDA receptors by MK801 produces a deficit in sucrose preference in rats

evidence_sentences: the direct infusion of ketamine into the mPFC is not sufficient to produce anti-depressant response in rats

aggregated_relations.subject: repeated testing
evidence_sentences: repeated testing of mice does not in itself result in increased depressive behavior

aggregated_relations.subject: ketamine and MK801
evidence_sentences: both ketamine and MK801, at doses producing antidepressant-like activity, had similar behavioral effects in our mutant mice
